# ECIS Drug Timing Analysis

This project analyzes Electric Cell-Substrate Impedance Sensing (ECIS) time-series data to study how cancer cells respond to drug treatments over time and how drug timing affects outcomes.

## Objectives

- Load and preprocess ECIS datasets
- Normalize impedance signals to baseline
- Compare experimental conditions and replicates
- Visualize time-series behavior
- Support drug scheduling optimization research

## Tools

- Python
- Pandas
- Matplotlib
- JupyterLab
